---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement to make StreamGuard better for streamers
title: "[FEAT] <short description of the proposed feature>"
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

<!--
  Thank you for suggesting a feature!
  The more context you provide, the easier it is to evaluate and prioritize your idea.
  Please search existing issues before submitting to avoid duplicates.
-->

## Problem Statement

<!--
  Is your feature request related to a problem you are experiencing?
  Describe it clearly. Help us understand the frustration or limitation from a streamer's perspective.
  
  Example: "It's frustrating that I have no way to see when new viewers join the stream — I have to manually watch chat for join messages, and I miss most of them."
-->

## Proposed Solution

<!--
  Describe the feature you would like to see as clearly as possible.
  - What would it look like in the UI?
  - How would a streamer interact with it?
  - What should happen when it is triggered?
-->

## Alternatives Considered

<!--
  Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?
  Why are they insufficient compared to your proposed solution?
-->

## Streamer Use Case

<!--
  This is the most important section. Help us understand:
  - What type of streamer would benefit? (gaming, IRL, music, talk show, etc.)
  - How frequently would this feature be used during a stream?
  - Would this be used by most streamers or only a niche subset?
  
  Strong use cases are the primary factor in feature prioritization.
-->

## Implementation Hints *(optional)*

<!--
  If you have technical knowledge of the YouTube Data API v3 or the codebase, feel free to suggest:
  - Which API endpoints might be needed
  - Which source file(s) would likely need changes
  - Any known limitations or quota implications
-->

## Reference Examples *(optional)*

<!--
  Are there other streaming tools (StreamElements, Streamlabs, Nightbot, etc.) that implement something similar?
  Screenshots, links, or descriptions of how they do it are very helpful for scoping the feature.
-->

## Priority *(self-assessed)*

<!-- How important is this feature to you personally? -->
- [ ] 🔥 Critical — significantly impacts my ability to moderate streams
- [ ] ⭐ High — would meaningfully improve my streaming workflow
- [ ] 💡 Nice to have — would be a useful quality-of-life improvement
- [ ] 🌱 Future consideration — low urgency, but worth tracking
